Team RobomanipalHardware Hackathon 3.0

Engineering innovation through modular hardware and intelligent software.

Get Started →

🔧 Modular Hardware

Cleanly engineered mechanical and electronic subsystems designed for rapid iteration.

💻 Intelligent Software

Robust firmware with well-defined communication protocols and clean architecture.

📊 Market Validated

Backed by thorough market research, competitor analysis, and a real-world case study.

Quick Start

Get up and running in seconds.

terminal
$git clone https://github.com/team-robomanipal/project-name.git # Clone the repo
$cd project-name && pip install -r requirements.txt # Install dependencies
$python main.py # Run the project
